title: Stop consecutive empty Codex agent waits and pressure-test the rule
action: Implement D1-D5 with the bee-writing-skills Iron Law. Before changing any skill/doctrine wording, copy the frozen RED payload, choices, exact rationalizations, old-guidance rubric, and RED command/output location from pressure-tests.md into all three bee-swarming CREATION-LOG.md copies. Add a doctrine census assertion to canonical test_lib.mjs plus its .agents/.claude copies, run the canonical test against the old surfaces, and record the real RED command/output in CREATION-LOG.md before proceeding. GREEN: add one concise always-loaded rule to the master AGENTS block, root AGENTS.md, and matching .agents/.claude AGENTS templates. It must name wait_agent/list_agents, forbid an empty wait directly followed by wait_agent with no authority/urgency exception, and require the exact D3 interval: continue material task-local work or, only when none remains, take exactly one list_agents snapshot; then send concise commentary naming both live agent state and next action; only then may a later bounded wait occur. No-op work, repeated state reads, hidden reasoning, or commentary alone do not qualify. Timeout preserves every running agent, claim, and reservation and never licenses interrupt or duplicate dispatch. External process/artifact polling remains excluded. Mirror the procedure into canonical plus .agents/.claude routing-and-contracts and bee-swarming SKILL/reference, preserving silence-is-not-failure and unrelated projection drift. Run one fresh review-tier pressure child at a time with fork_turns=none using the exact GREEN wrapper and frozen three scenario blocks in pressure-tests.md; the child must read root AGENTS plus canonical ordinary-gather and swarming surfaces, choose B in all three, and state the exact D3 sequence. Record the resolved prompt, verbatim output, and scoring immediately in all CREATION-LOG copies. Sync doctrine-layer.md. Run the narrow verify and then attempt the exact configured full repository verify; retain its exact output, including nested-child sandbox denial if present, without relabeling it green. Do not change Codex UI/tool implementation, scheduling, timeout duration, external executor polling, whole-tree projections, unrelated projection drift, or worktree-isolation artifacts.

truths: empty wait directly followed by wait_agent is explicitly forbidden with no authority or urgency exception

a later wait requires this exact interval: continue material task-local work or, only when none remains, take exactly one list_agents snapshot; then send concise commentary naming both live agent state and next action
no-op work, repeated state reads, hidden reasoning, generic commentary, or commentary without the material action does not qualify
timeout never implies failure and never triggers interrupt, duplicate dispatch, claim release, or reservation release
ordinary delegated gathers and swarm workers inherit the same native Codex rule
external CLI process and artifact polling remains outside the native-agent rule
one fresh review-tier child replays the frozen three scenarios with amended surfaces loaded and chooses the exact D3 sequence in all three
master, root, .agents, and .claude doctrine/procedure surfaces are pinned by a failing-then-green feature-anchor census
the cell owns and records an attempt of the exact configured full repository verify after the narrow verify
artifacts: always-loaded wait discipline in master/root/.agents/.claude AGENTS doctrine
ordinary-gather tending contract in canonical/.agents/.claude routing-and-contracts.md
native Codex collection contract in canonical/.agents/.claude bee-swarming SKILL.md and swarming-reference.md
frozen replay protocol plus RED/GREEN exact evidence in all three bee-swarming CREATION-LOG.md copies
feature-anchor doctrine census assertions in canonical/.agents/.claude test_lib.mjs
full repository verify attempt output or exact sandbox-denial evidence
key_links: pressure-tests.md frozen RED payload, GREEN wrapper, and scoring rubric
prohibitions: no consecutive wait_agent permission hidden behind vague useful-work wording
no no-op command, repeated inspection, hidden reasoning, generic commentary, or commentary-only loophole
no timeout-as-failure, interrupt, redispatch, claim release, or reservation release
no change to external CLI polling
no whole-tree projection sync or reconciliation of unrelated projection drift
no skill wording before RED evidence and RED census output are recorded

trace.blocked_reason: Current sandbox makes .agents projection files read-only; root and worker both confirmed write denial before any feature wording changed.
trace.dropped_reason: Sandbox denied required .agents writes before feature wording changed; replacement cell uses always-loaded root doctrine, canonical source, and writable .claude projection with the constraint explicit.
